template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of productKind keycap-set
subject: Five CYL-profile keycaps in a tight editorial cluster — three back-row, two front-row offset right. Unbleached cream bodies (the alpha story) with one focal Prussian-red cap (front-left) as the alert accent. Back-right cap carries a faint Prussian-red blush on its top surface, suggesting a modifier key. Bronze theme dot at upper-right margin.
